label: AppleScript • scripted many-literal decode + expand
query: Set the body of the note 'Digest' to the provided summary.
notes: Model-free CI anchor for scale: a 15-entry contents map decodes and a specific literal — 'summary', which sorts past the prompt's preview cap (maxPreviewed=12) so it is announced name-only — expands to the exact escaped text before execution. The mock 'app world' un-escapes it back to prove byte-fidelity. Guards the literal store + expansion at scale. No tokens.

contents.summary: Bottom line: on track for the June release.

finalState.equals: Bottom line: on track for the June release.
